name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-15
title: No test verifies invariant 6 (empty features list is valid)
description: Spec invariant 6 and contract both say an empty features list [] is a valid response. No test exercises this. Add a test that mocks an Agent response with [] and verifies callers don't reject it.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-17 (no test for Inv 6), fixed by PR #118
